highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia m151 and eliminates allocations across several performance-critical hot paths.
highlights_body: Color parsing, SKShaper glyph reads, and HarfBuzz shaping are reworked for zero-copy, allocation-free operation. A CPU raster regression introduced with the m151 sync is also corrected.

bullets.detail: Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151 and merges several rounds of upstream m151 bug fixes.
Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT so CPU-rasterised surfaces produce correct output after the m151 sync.
Adds ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads to SKColor hex parsing and optimises the internal path, removing a string allocation on every call.

bullets.lead: SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans
bullets.detail: GlyphRun data is now consumed through a Span<T> path rather than copying each element, reducing allocations during text layout.
Drops the unnecessary unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions, making it accessible from safe-only contexts without a compiler switch.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) now releases the underlying native handle when the subset crop fails, preventing a handle leak.
Removes the char[4] heap allocation made on every SKFourByteTag.Parse call by inlining the character construction.
Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 prebuilt libraries needed to target .NET 11's WASM runtime, keeping SkiaSharp usable on the next .NET WASM host.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WASM, fixed the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the Skia submodule, and built the cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and a fix to remove the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition warning from WASM builds.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 landed the allocation-free SKShaper span path, the ReadOnlySpan<char> SKColor overloads, the GRContextOptions unsafe removal, HarfBuzz hot-path allocation fixes, and a batch of upstream m151 engine bug fixes.

harfbuzz_summary: Removes per-call heap allocations in HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 via a pooled UTF-8 encoder and in HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse by inlining the char array construction, making shaping hot paths allocation-free.
